# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment that mounts host directories for our logging agent. The pod needs access to /var/log and /var/lib/docker to collect logs from all containers. This is for our centralized logging system that runs as a DaemonSet.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent container security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: DaemonSet
metadata:
  name: logging-agent
  namespace: logging
  labels:
    app: logging-agent
    component: log-collector
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: logging-agent
  updateStrategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxUnavailable: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: logging-agent
        component: log-collector
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: logging-agent
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 10000
        runAsGroup: 10000
        fsGroup: 10000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      tolerations:
        - key: node-role.kubernetes.io/control-plane
          effect: NoSchedule
        - key: node-role.kubernetes.io/master
          effect: NoSchedule
      containers:
        - name: logging-agent
          image: logging-agent:1.2.0@sha256:abc123def456789placeholder
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 10000
            runAsGroup: 10000
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
              add:
                - DAC_READ_SEARCH
            seccompProfile:
              type: RuntimeDefault
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
          env:
            - name: NODE_NAME
              valueFrom:
                fieldRef:
                  fieldPath: spec.nodeName
            - name: LOG_LEVEL
              value: "info"
          volumeMounts:
            - name: varlog
              mountPath: /var/log
              readOnly: true
            - name: varlibdockercontainers
              mountPath: /var/lib/docker/containers
              readOnly: true
            - name: agent-tmp
              mountPath: /tmp
            - name: agent-data
              mountPath: /var/lib/logging-agent
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 30
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /readyz
              port: 8080
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          ports:
            - name: health
              containerPort: 8080
              protocol: TCP
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      hostNetwork: false
      hostPID: false
      hostIPC: false
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      volumes:
        - name: varlog
          hostPath:
            path: /var/log
            type: Directory
        - name: varlibdockercontainers
          hostPath:
            path: /var/lib/docker/containers
            type: Directory
        - name: agent-tmp
          emptyDir:
            medium: Memory
            sizeLimit: 64Mi
        - name: agent-data
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 256Mi
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: logging-agent
  namespace: logging
  labels:
    app: logging-agent
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: logging-agent-netpol
  namespace: logging
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: logging-agent
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress: []
  egress:
    - to: []
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 443
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
          podSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 53
